title: albizia elliptica
intro: Albizia elliptica, also known as the East Indian walnut or Indian walnut, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia and Australia. This tree is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Albizia elliptica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine and modern healthcare.
